title: Cultivation Planet Crystal
content: It is object given by cultivation alliance to plant it in the planets.little by little it absorbs little piece of soul from all the organisms that was in that planet where crystal was planted.Only Suzakus can control it and with it they can kill whoever they want unless that person is ascendant or above.Second Suzaku Situ Nan sealed it cause he thinked it was evil object to use it like that.
